situational_context: Running comeback weeks 9-10: 14 structured runs since May 3 (63 days in). Distances progressed to 6 km (Run #14 today, though prescribed was 4 km — persistent overshoot pattern: Run #12 was 7.5 km vs ~4 km, Run #14 was 6 km vs 4 km). VO2max running 41.5 (up from 38.3 at start, +3.2). ACWR normalized to 0.96 (was 1.35 at last check Jun 14). HRV 7d avg 36 ms (BALANCED, recovering from UNBALANCED in late June). Weight 103.67 kg with favorable recomposition (fat% 26.3%, muscle 72.62 kg — muscle +1.16 kg vs Jun 7). E-bike commuting remains primary volume contributor (~38 km round trip, ~14 load per commute day). Vacation starts Jul 12 (Saint-Malo by train). 2 sur-site days this week (Mon Jul 7, Wed Jul 9). No new labs since Dec 2025; Vitamin D retest overdue (target was July 2026). Protein intake averaging 108g/day vs 150g target — chronically low.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sortie vélo weekend — gravel/ebike 60 min Z2

recommendations.text: STRICT DISTANCE DISCIPLINE on Run #15 (Tue Jul 8): 3-4 km maximum, no exceptions. Run #14 today was 50% over target (6 km vs 4 km plan, suffer 30 vs 13-15). At 103.67 kg, repeated overshoot elevates Achilles/patellar tendon injury risk. Set a GPS alarm at 2 km to force turnaround.
recommendations.measurable: Run #15 distance ≤ 4.0 km and suffer score ≤ 18

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake to ≥ 130g (current 7d avg: 108g vs 150g target). During running comeback with muscle recomposition at 103.67 kg, inadequate protein delays tendon adaptation and recovery. Prioritize 30-40g protein at post-workout meal.

Schedule Vitamin D retest — now overdue (planned for July 2026). Last value 27 ng/mL (Dec 2025) was insufficient. At current body weight, sub-40 ng/mL approximately doubles stress fracture risk during running rebuild (Burgi 2011, Miller 2016).

markers_to_watch.reason: Persistent pattern: Run #12 (7.5 km vs ~4 km), Run #14 (6 km vs 4 km). At 103.67 kg, tissue tolerance is the limiting factor, not cardiovascular fitness

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if HRV 7d avg drops below 33 ms or fails to recover toward 37+ within 7 days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 36 (BALANCED), recovering from late-June dip to 34. Watch for regression after today's high-load run (suffer 30)

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized Achilles/patellar tendon pain lasting >24h after Run #14 → skip Run #15 Tuesday
markers_to_watch.reason: 6 km at 103.67 kg with suffer 30 = high impact load; tissue response over next 48h is critical
